```plantuml
@startuml
' version: 1.20201107
' Skichampionships Management Class Diagram

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam monochrome true

package "Scm" {
    class Event {
        <<C>>
        -id: int
        -location: string
        -startDate: Date
        -endDate: Date
        +create(): Event
        +update()
        +delete(): bool
        +list(): Event[]
        +export(): bool
        +import(): bool
    }

    class Result {
        <<C>>
        -time: Time
        +create(): Result
        +delete(): bool
        +list(): Result[]
    }

    class Run {
        <<C>>
        -number: int
        -time: Time
        Getters and setters
        +getId()
        Other methods...
        +create(): Run
        +delete(): bool
    }

    class Competitor {
        <<C>>
        -id: int
        -lastName: string
        -firstName: string
        -birthDate: Date
        -bibNumber: int
        -email: string
        -photo: resource
        +create(): Competitor
        +update()
        +delete(): bool
        +list(): Competitor[]
    }

    class Category {
        <<C>>
    }

    class Metadata {
        <<A>>
        #id: int
        #name: string
        #description: string
        #create()
        #update()
        #delete(): bool
        #list(): Metadata
    }

    class Profile {
        <<C>>
    }

    ' Relationships
    Event "1" *-- "0..n" Competitor : takes part
    Competitor "0..n" o-- "1" Category : belongs to
    Category --|> Metadata
    Competitor "0..n" *-- "1" Profile : has
    Profile --|> Metadata
    Competitor "0..n" *-- "0..n" Result : obtains
    Competitor "0..n" *-- "0..n" Run : runs
}

note top: Ski Championships\nManagement
note bottom: Ski Championships Management\nClass Diagram\nBertrand C
```
